name: How to Build a Privacy-First AI
shortDescription: A practical guide to designing AI systems that respect user privacy from day one.
author: Neubofy Team

content.text: Designing privacy-first AI starts with minimizing the data you collect. Collect only what's necessary and prefer derived features over raw personal data whenever possible.
Use techniques like differential privacy, federated learning, and local inference to keep sensitive data on-device. Strong access controls and encryption in transit and at rest are essential.
Finally, make privacy a user-facing feature: give users control to delete data and explain what you store and why.
